description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a wooden stock and fore-end with a natural wood grain finish. The barrels are matte black, extending parallel to each other, and are joined together with no visible ribbing or venting. The stock is a full, traditional design, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, and the trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a double-trigger mechanism. The receiver and action area are compact, with a break-action hinge clearly visible, indicating the shotgun opens for loading and unloading. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a focus on durability and straightforward operation, typical of hunting or sporting shotguns.
description: A side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a wooden stock and matte black barrels, featuring a break-action mechanism and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin black barrels aligned side-by-side and the narrow profile of the wooden fore-end.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, the wooden stock, the break-action hinge, and the double barrels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock and the back ends of the barrels, with the trigger guard barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden stock and double barrels clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
